TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Columbia, title = Columbia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Columbia} }

S.FORM: Columbia Columbia Columbia kapulungan a kanatal (Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Rep√ļblica de Colombia), pangangan han tu Columbia , u Nan-me-cuw i satipan nu amisanay a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam: :Rep√ļblica de Colombia), ) u Columbia sa ilabu nu Congnanmeico, itiza i 4 00 N, 72 00 W, u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 1,138,910 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1,038,700 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 100,210 km2 ,hamin nu tademaw sa 47,220,856. kakalukan umah sa 37.50%, kilakilangan umah sa 54.40%, zumaay henay umah sa 8.10% tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Bogota . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 20 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Iv√°n Duque M√°rquez , micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihca 8 bulad 7 demiad. u hata nu Colombia u kulit nu hata nu Colombia sa ,situlu a kulit, u takuliway u semilaway atu sumanahay. Columbia Ke-lum-bi-ya-kung-he-ku (Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Rep√ļblica de Colombia), pangangan han tu Columbia , u Nan-me-cuw i satipan nu amisanay a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam: :Rep√ļblica de Colombia), .) laylay i kasumamadan henay u Ci-pu-ca a binacadan u Yin-ti-an a tademaw i tini muenengay tina lala'an Spain mihephepay pakalatu 1500 a mihcaanay, katukuh tu kuynian a kakitizaan maka awas tu mangangayawan, u hitay, unikawlah nu ngangayaw atu libung nu imelang, masulup amin ku balucu' nu i tiniay Ci-pu-zen a tademaw, u heni kalamkam satu a patizeng a i tiza nueneng satu i 1717 a mihcaan malahatu mala u pasu u Spain i Nan-me-cuw nu satipan nuwamisan a kakitizaan nu micumuday a lala'an kakitizaan "a Sin-ke-la-na-ta"śĖįś†ľśčČÁīćťĀĒ". Columbia mikawaw tu misateked i 1810 a mihcaan a mabuwah pitu a bulad sabaw tusa a demiad musakamu amiliyas tu Si-pang-ya a misateked , sazikuzay i 1819 a mihcaan maala pakademec tu, 1821 a mihcaan atu ayzaay a E-kua-du , Wey-ne-zuy-la , Pa-na-ma u nikasakaput tu tabakiay a Columbia kapulungan a kanatal , ayza satu Sin-ke-lan-na-ta pasumad tu ngangan nu tabakiay a Columbia kapulungan a kanatal"Ś§ßŚď•ŚÄęśĮĒšļěŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč"(Gran Colombia)han Si-meng-pu-li-wa-li-wa-el tahekal mala zung-tung , katukuh i 1830 a mihcaan unian a mihcaan Si-meng-pu-li-wa-li-wa-el micuzuh tu unian a kanatal tu nizatengan nu tademawan min, lalabu nu kanatal u cen-ce a tu lala' malaengeli' sazikuzay satu i a 1830 a mihcaanWiy-ne-zuy-la atu E-kuwa-du miliyas tu tabakiay a Columbia kapulungan a kanatal a misateket, Ta-ke-lun-pi-ya-kung-he-ku namahini satu malaliyas, Pu-li-wa-li-wa-el i kalaluman patay satu, tabakiay a Columbia kapulungan a kanatal u liwan a lala' pasumat han ku ngangan Sin-ke-la-na-ta"śĖįś†ľśčČÁīćťĀĒ"(Nueva Granada), 1856 a mihcaan pasumad tu ngangan Ke-lan-na-da-lian-bang"ś†ľŤė≠ÁīćťĀĒŤĀĮťā¶"(Confederaci√≥n Granadina)han, 1863 a mihcaan pasumad aca tu ngangan Columbia-he-cung-ku"Śď•ŚÄęśĮĒšļěŚźąÁúĺŚúč" han, sazikuzay(Estados Unidos de Colombia), Sazikuzay i 1886 a mihcaan pasumad aca tu ngangan nu Columbia kapulungan a kanatal"Śď•ŚÄęśĮĒšļěŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč"han, nika lalabu nu kanatal caay kalecat kuni u cen-ce u icelang pikuwan makelap nu zumaan nu sangaan tu malaliyasay mahiza tu malalit satu hina mabuwah tu lalabuay kinangangaaw , hina buwah mangangayaw ku lalabuay nu kanatal, 1903 a mihcaan Pa-na-ma I tini a Me-ku tu pipadang mamakay Columbia a nisakateked . imahini Columbia mahiza tu nu padang henay a hitay mahiniay a hitay patinaku u Columbia ke-min-uw-zuan-li-lian (FARC)), atu pacakayay tu siledekay a sapayu' malawlaw tu satu, u lalabu nu kanatal a cen-ce kikasumad tu masakangelu'an tu atu pihazen tu kuni papelpel ku ni kauzip nu binawlan amin, amalilit ku lalayan nu Columbia a kanatal. namisateked hawsa katukuh i 2002 a mihcaan, umisatekeday a misakaputay atu u mazekeday a sakaput, Ze-yu-dang atu Paw-su-dang kakutay sa a mikawaw, Columbia a cung-dung ci U-li-wey namala cung-dung tu 2002 a mihcaan, miala tu pasaicelang atekatay a pakawananay a zazanan, FARC malawitan nu uynian a kanatal a zen-bu, u kawaw namakay anitu ni ungangayaw i 1983 a mihcaan namipatay tu wama ni U-li-wiy , namacakat i pabaw U-li-wiy hasa, amipelpel tu Columbia mingayaw ku saayaway a kawaw satu. An-di-de-san a buyu'an pabesut I nusatipa, malaliting ku buyu' atu dihep, I lilies nu bayu' mapetpetay a nenal,satipan nu anisanaynu Ma-ke-da-lay-ma-he I sasa malikit masaupu I masanenalay, sawalian u Ya-ma-sun-he atu Au-li-nu-ke-he ipabaw nu kasacilis nu sauwac malikit tayza i masanenalay, macalap mahamin ku kanatal u he bala 2/3 ku hekal nu lala'.u demiad nu mauzipay nulangaway Ke-lun-pi-ya tungusay u mauzipay nulangaway u aadupan nu hekal nu lala' u kakakilac a kakitizaan, u akudiay a kakitizaan. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) Sakakawawan a keni nu kakitizaanŤ°ĆśĒŅŚćÄŚäÉ Columbia a kanatal mala u 3/2 a niyazu' atu cacay kahenulan a tuse. (u kamu nu Hulam: ) zen-ze Ke-lun-pi-ya a zen-ze u cung-tung ku situngusay tu nu Min-cu-ze-cung-he-ku i panutek i lalabu a mikawaw, i tini i lalabu a sakakawawan Columbia-cung-tung u satalakaway nu kanatal u sibunuay aca a zen-ze mikawaw a tukatuutay a sakaputan, Sin-zen-cuan si tungusy mikawaw u zen-bu ku mikawaway, Columbia cenhu atu Ku-huy tusaay a tatengilan a kanatal, Can-iy-uyan atuKung-iy-uen situngusay tu hulic Li-ba-cuan , Se-ba-ki-go misateked mikawaw tu nu hulic a kawaw King-ci-hiy-zen-sin-si-se i 2016 a mihcaan u Ke-lun-pi-ya mala tusa nu u kasatademaw a nizatengan nu kanatal. Columbia i tiniay a binacadan In-ti-an-zen , Si-pang-ya u micunutay a tademaw atu By-cuw nu kuli matenes ku ni kalalamel nueneng malaacawa pinaay tu lasubu a mihcaan hausa siwawa tu malalamelay tu ku izang nu In-o-hun-huy-zen-cun tademaw mala tu(58%)salengacay a tademaw pakala tu(20%)lumeni'ay salengacay malalemay a wawa (14%)lumeniay a tademaw(4%) atu In-ti-an u lumeni'ay a tademaw malalemelay a wawa(3%)ayzasatu uyza dada' pakala tu 1% ku tademaw u mapalucekay u tatenga'ay a tademawan, satu izaw tu nu uzapay a kamu atu lisin nu In-tian-zen , Ke-lun-pi-ya a ngangan a lisin u Tan-ku-ciw . (u kamu nu Hulam: .) Ke-lun-pi-ya nu La-ding-me-cuw a tademaw u sakatulu u tabakiay a kanatal, i Pa-si atu Mu-si-ke hawsa nu malukay a tademaw katuud sa pasayza i tuseay a tademaw palalecat pakay 1951 a mihcaan 57% ku talakaw katukuh 1994 a mihcaan tu 74%. 30 tuse nu tatemaw, malakunit tu 100,000 nuwalian siwa ku i sasaan a kenis micalat tu Ke-lun-pi-ya a hekal nu lala'tu 54%, nika caay pakala tu 3% a tademaw, tademaw u kakatuud nu tademaw i sasacacay kakatuud cacay a tademawan tu ping-ban-cian-mi. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) kawaw nu hitay Columbia nu La-ting-me-cuw u satabakiay a kanatal nu kawawa nu hitay izaw ku i tiniay u satabakiay u saicelangay a kawaw nu hity ayza u malahitaay a hitay izaw ku 445,000 ku tademaw, i tuni i kitakit u sakasabaw cacay, u pilawpes tu kalisiw nu hitay 121.45 i'nu amilika a kalisiw, i La-me kanatalan uyza dada' i Bazil . Columbia a cin-ci ha tinikatenes masaadidi' nu kanatal zen-bu anizatengan mawada tu atu siykay zen-bu a kasilut caay kanetek mahini ku nikalilit ayza satu Ke-lun-pi-ya zen-bu micuzuh tu Iyang-law-cing pasumat sapahapay tu babalaki a kalisiw, atu masazumaay mawada tu ku inaay a sakakawawan a hulic, zayhan i ayawway ningangayawan tu mahicahicaay a kawawa. Columbia tusa kuni u patahekalan a nilaculan u simal atu kuhi i ayaw caay ka kaph, kuhi u ni alaan kayadah atu aca caay ka kapah, simal paydemiad mawada' tu kuni patakal, maydih a lalit asa miazih mipatadas tu baluhay a ubah nu sumal. Columbia mahamin a mihcaan papulung tu cacay u kalinulakan a kawaw nu lisin, mahiniay u patinaku tu mahiniay u nu "tedemaway caay kunutuuday a lalangawanay u ni subelitan a caysan a nilaculan, tayhiw amipangangan ni sulitan tu Pa-lan-ci-ya-ciy-nian-hua"Ś∑īŤė≠ŚüļšļěŚėČŚĻīŤŹĮ". (u kamu nu Hulam: .) malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

(u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ) z…ôn-z…ô k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja a z…ôn-z…ô u ¶uŇč-tuŇč ku situŇčusaj tu nu min- ¶u-z…ô- ¶uŇč-ńß…ô-ku i panut…ôk i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu a mikawaw, i tini i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu a sakakawawan ¶or~…ĺumbia- ¶uŇč-tuŇč u satar~…ĺakawaj nu kanatar~…ĺ u sibunuaj a ¶a a z…ôn-z…ô mikawaw a tukatuutaj a sakaputan, sin-z…ôn- ¶uan si tuŇčusj mikawaw u z…ôn-bu ku mikawawaj, ¶or~…ĺumbia ¶…ônńßu atu ku-ńßuj tusaaj a tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan a kanatar~…ĺ, ¶an-ij-ujan atukuŇč-ij-u…ôn situŇčusaj tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ r~…ĺi-ba- ¶uan , s…ô-ba-ki-go misat…ôk…ôd mikawaw tu nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a kawaw kiŇč- ¶i-ńßij-z…ôn-sin-si-s…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan u k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja mar~…ĺa tusa nu u kasatad…ômaw a nizat…ôŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ. ¶or~…ĺumbia i tiniaj a bina ¶adan in-ti-an-z…ôn , si-paŇč-ja u mi ¶unutaj a tad…ômaw atu bj- ¶uw nu kur~…ĺi mat…ôn…ôs ku ni kar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ nu…ôn…ôŇč mar~…ĺaa ¶awa pinaaj tu r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan ńßausa siwawa tu mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj tu ku izaŇč nu in-o-ńßun-ńßuj-z…ôn- ¶un tad…ômaw mar~…ĺa tu(**%)sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu(**%)r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ômaj a wawa (**%)r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw(*%) atu in-ti-an u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôr~…ĺaj a wawa(*%)ajzasatu ujza dada Ē~ ° pakar~…ĺa tu *% ku tad…ômaw u mapar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a tad…ômawan, satu izaw tu nu uzapaj a kamu atu r~…ĺisin nu in-tian-z…ôn , k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja a ŇčaŇčan a r~…ĺisin u tan-ku- ¶iw . (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja nu r~…ĺa-diŇč-m…ô- ¶uw a tad…ômaw u sakatur~…ĺu u tabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺ, i pa-si atu mu-si-k…ô ńßawsa nu mar~…ĺukaj a tad…ômaw katuud sa pasajza i tus…ôaj a tad…ômaw par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶at pakaj **** a mińß ¶aan **% ku tar~…ĺakaw katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan tu **%. ** tus…ô nu tat…ômaw, mar~…ĺakunit tu ***,*** nuwar~…ĺian siwa ku i sasaan a k…ônis mi ¶ar~…ĺat tu k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °tu **%, nika ¶aaj pakar~…ĺa tu *% a tad…ômaw, tad…ômaw u kakatuud nu tad…ômaw i sasa ¶a ¶aj kakatuud ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômawan tu piŇč-ban- ¶ian-mi. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kawaw nu ńßitaj ¶or~…ĺumbia nu r~…ĺa-tiŇč-m…ô- ¶uw u satabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺ nu kawawa nu ńßitaj izaw ku i tiniaj u satabakiaj u sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a kawaw nu ńßitj ajza u mar~…ĺańßitaaj a ńßitaj izaw ku ***,*** ku tad…ômaw, i tuni i kitakit u sakasabaw ¶a ¶aj, u pir~…ĺawp…ôs tu kar~…ĺisiw nu ńßitaj ***.** i Ē~ °nu amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw, i r~…ĺa-m…ô kanatar~…ĺan ujza dada Ē~ ° i bazir~…ĺ . ¶or~…ĺumbia a ¶in- ¶i ńßa tinikat…ôn…ôs masaadidi Ē~ ° nu kanatar~…ĺ z…ôn-bu anizat…ôŇčan mawada tu atu sijkaj z…ôn-bu a kasir~…ĺut ¶aaj kan…ôt…ôk mańßini ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺit ajza satu k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja z…ôn-bu mi ¶uzuńß tu ijaŇč-r~…ĺaw- ¶iŇč pasumat sapańßapaj tu babar~…ĺaki a kar~…ĺisiw, atu masazumaaj mawada tu ku inaaj a sakakawawan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, zajńßan i ajawwaj niŇčaŇčajawan tu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a kawawa. ¶or~…ĺumbia tusa kuni u patańß…ôkar~…ĺan a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan u simar~…ĺ atu kuńßi i ajaw ¶aaj ka kapńß, kuńßi u ni ar~…ĺaan kajadańß atu a ¶a ¶aaj ka kapańß, simar~…ĺ pajd…ômiad mawada Ē~ ° tu kuni patakar~…ĺ, majdińß a r~…ĺar~…ĺit asa miazińß mipatadas tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ubańß nu sumar~…ĺ. ¶or~…ĺumbia mańßamin a mińß ¶aan papur~…ĺuŇč tu ¶a ¶aj u kar~…ĺinur~…ĺakan a kawaw nu r~…ĺisin, mańßiniaj u patinaku tu mańßiniaj u nu "t…ôd…ômawaj ¶aaj kunutuudaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawanaj u ni sub…ôr~…ĺitan a ¶ajsan a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, tajńßiw amipaŇčaŇčan ni sur~…ĺitan tu pa-r~…ĺan- ¶i-ja- ¶ij-nian-ńßua"*******". (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Columbia Columbia Columbia kapulungan a kanatal (Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Rep√ļblica de Colombia), pangangan han tu Columbia , u Nan-me-cuw i satipan nu amisanay a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam: :Rep√ļblica de Colombia), ) u Columbia sa ilabu nu Congnanmeico, itiza i 4 00 N, 72 00 W, u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 1,138,910 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1,038,700 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 100,210 km2 ,hamin nu tademaw sa 47,220,856. kakalukan umah sa 37.50%, kilakilangan umah sa 54.40%, zumaay henay umah sa 8.10% tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Bogota . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 20 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Iv√°n Duque M√°rquez , micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihca 8 bulad 7 demiad. u hata nu Colombia u kulit nu hata nu Colombia sa ,situlu a kulit, u takuliway u semilaway atu sumanahay. Columbia Ke-lum-bi-ya-kung-he-ku (Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Rep√ļblica de Colombia), pangangan han tu Columbia , u Nan-me-cuw i satipan nu amisanay a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam: :Rep√ļblica de Colombia), .) laylay i kasumamadan henay u Ci-pu-ca a binacadan u Yin-ti-an a tademaw i tini muenengay tina lala'an Spain mihephepay pakalatu 1500 a mihcaanay, katukuh tu kuynian a kakitizaan maka awas tu mangangayawan, u hitay, unikawlah nu ngangayaw atu libung nu imelang, masulup amin ku balucu' nu i tiniay Ci-pu-zen a tademaw, u heni kalamkam satu a patizeng a i tiza nueneng satu i 1717 a mihcaan malahatu mala u pasu u Spain i Nan-me-cuw nu satipan nuwamisan a kakitizaan nu micumuday a lala'an kakitizaan "a Sin-ke-la-na-ta"śĖįś†ľśčČÁīćťĀĒ". Columbia mikawaw tu misateked i 1810 a mihcaan a mabuwah pitu a bulad sabaw tusa a demiad musakamu amiliyas tu Si-pang-ya a misateked , sazikuzay i 1819 a mihcaan maala pakademec tu, 1821 a mihcaan atu ayzaay a E-kua-du , Wey-ne-zuy-la , Pa-na-ma u nikasakaput tu tabakiay a Columbia kapulungan a kanatal , ayza satu Sin-ke-lan-na-ta pasumad tu ngangan nu tabakiay a Columbia kapulungan a kanatal"Ś§ßŚď•ŚÄęśĮĒšļěŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč"(Gran Colombia)han Si-meng-pu-li-wa-li-wa-el tahekal mala zung-tung , katukuh i 1830 a mihcaan unian a mihcaan Si-meng-pu-li-wa-li-wa-el micuzuh tu unian a kanatal tu nizatengan nu tademawan min, lalabu nu kanatal u cen-ce a tu lala' malaengeli' sazikuzay satu i a 1830 a mihcaanWiy-ne-zuy-la atu E-kuwa-du miliyas tu tabakiay a Columbia kapulungan a kanatal a misateket, Ta-ke-lun-pi-ya-kung-he-ku namahini satu malaliyas, Pu-li-wa-li-wa-el i kalaluman patay satu, tabakiay a Columbia kapulungan a kanatal u liwan a lala' pasumat han ku ngangan Sin-ke-la-na-ta"śĖįś†ľśčČÁīćťĀĒ"(Nueva Granada), 1856 a mihcaan pasumad tu ngangan Ke-lan-na-da-lian-bang"ś†ľŤė≠ÁīćťĀĒŤĀĮťā¶"(Confederaci√≥n Granadina)han, 1863 a mihcaan pasumad aca tu ngangan Columbia-he-cung-ku"Śď•ŚÄęśĮĒšļěŚźąÁúĺŚúč" han, sazikuzay(Estados Unidos de Colombia), Sazikuzay i 1886 a mihcaan pasumad aca tu ngangan nu Columbia kapulungan a kanatal"Śď•ŚÄęśĮĒšļěŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč"han, nika lalabu nu kanatal caay kalecat kuni u cen-ce u icelang pikuwan makelap nu zumaan nu sangaan tu malaliyasay mahiza tu malalit satu hina mabuwah tu lalabuay kinangangaaw , hina buwah mangangayaw ku lalabuay nu kanatal, 1903 a mihcaan Pa-na-ma I tini a Me-ku tu pipadang mamakay Columbia a nisakateked . imahini Columbia mahiza tu nu padang henay a hitay mahiniay a hitay patinaku u Columbia ke-min-uw-zuan-li-lian (FARC)), atu pacakayay tu siledekay a sapayu' malawlaw tu satu, u lalabu nu kanatal a cen-ce kikasumad tu masakangelu'an tu atu pihazen tu kuni papelpel ku ni kauzip nu binawlan amin, amalilit ku lalayan nu Columbia a kanatal. namisateked hawsa katukuh i 2002 a mihcaan, umisatekeday a misakaputay atu u mazekeday a sakaput, Ze-yu-dang atu Paw-su-dang kakutay sa a mikawaw, Columbia a cung-dung ci U-li-wey namala cung-dung tu 2002 a mihcaan, miala tu pasaicelang atekatay a pakawananay a zazanan, FARC malawitan nu uynian a kanatal a zen-bu, u kawaw namakay anitu ni ungangayaw i 1983 a mihcaan namipatay tu wama ni U-li-wiy , namacakat i pabaw U-li-wiy hasa, amipelpel tu Columbia mingayaw ku saayaway a kawaw satu. An-di-de-san a buyu'an pabesut I nusatipa, malaliting ku buyu' atu dihep, I lilies nu bayu' mapetpetay a nenal,satipan nu anisanaynu Ma-ke-da-lay-ma-he I sasa malikit masaupu I masanenalay, sawalian u Ya-ma-sun-he atu Au-li-nu-ke-he ipabaw nu kasacilis nu sauwac malikit tayza i masanenalay, macalap mahamin ku kanatal u he bala 2/3 ku hekal nu lala'.u demiad nu mauzipay nulangaway Ke-lun-pi-ya tungusay u mauzipay nulangaway u aadupan nu hekal nu lala' u kakakilac a kakitizaan, u akudiay a kakitizaan. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) Sakakawawan a keni nu kakitizaanŤ°ĆśĒŅŚćÄŚäÉ Columbia a kanatal mala u 3/2 a niyazu' atu cacay kahenulan a tuse. (u kamu nu Hulam: ) zen-ze Ke-lun-pi-ya a zen-ze u cung-tung ku situngusay tu nu Min-cu-ze-cung-he-ku i panutek i lalabu a mikawaw, i tini i lalabu a sakakawawan Columbia-cung-tung u satalakaway nu kanatal u sibunuay aca a zen-ze mikawaw a tukatuutay a sakaputan, Sin-zen-cuan si tungusy mikawaw u zen-bu ku mikawaway, Columbia cenhu atu Ku-huy tusaay a tatengilan a kanatal, Can-iy-uyan atuKung-iy-uen situngusay tu hulic Li-ba-cuan , Se-ba-ki-go misateked mikawaw tu nu hulic a kawaw King-ci-hiy-zen-sin-si-se i 2016 a mihcaan u Ke-lun-pi-ya mala tusa nu u kasatademaw a nizatengan nu kanatal. Columbia i tiniay a binacadan In-ti-an-zen , Si-pang-ya u micunutay a tademaw atu By-cuw nu kuli matenes ku ni kalalamel nueneng malaacawa pinaay tu lasubu a mihcaan hausa siwawa tu malalamelay tu ku izang nu In-o-hun-huy-zen-cun tademaw mala tu(58%)salengacay a tademaw pakala tu(20%)lumeni'ay salengacay malalemay a wawa (14%)lumeniay a tademaw(4%) atu In-ti-an u lumeni'ay a tademaw malalemelay a wawa(3%)ayzasatu uyza dada' pakala tu 1% ku tademaw u mapalucekay u tatenga'ay a tademawan, satu izaw tu nu uzapay a kamu atu lisin nu In-tian-zen , Ke-lun-pi-ya a ngangan a lisin u Tan-ku-ciw . (u kamu nu Hulam: .) Ke-lun-pi-ya nu La-ding-me-cuw a tademaw u sakatulu u tabakiay a kanatal, i Pa-si atu Mu-si-ke hawsa nu malukay a tademaw katuud sa pasayza i tuseay a tademaw palalecat pakay 1951 a mihcaan 57% ku talakaw katukuh 1994 a mihcaan tu 74%. 30 tuse nu tatemaw, malakunit tu 100,000 nuwalian siwa ku i sasaan a kenis micalat tu Ke-lun-pi-ya a hekal nu lala'tu 54%, nika caay pakala tu 3% a tademaw, tademaw u kakatuud nu tademaw i sasacacay kakatuud cacay a tademawan tu ping-ban-cian-mi. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) kawaw nu hitay Columbia nu La-ting-me-cuw u satabakiay a kanatal nu kawawa nu hitay izaw ku i tiniay u satabakiay u saicelangay a kawaw nu hity ayza u malahitaay a hitay izaw ku 445,000 ku tademaw, i tuni i kitakit u sakasabaw cacay, u pilawpes tu kalisiw nu hitay 121.45 i'nu amilika a kalisiw, i La-me kanatalan uyza dada' i Bazil . Columbia a cin-ci ha tinikatenes masaadidi' nu kanatal zen-bu anizatengan mawada tu atu siykay zen-bu a kasilut caay kanetek mahini ku nikalilit ayza satu Ke-lun-pi-ya zen-bu micuzuh tu Iyang-law-cing pasumat sapahapay tu babalaki a kalisiw, atu masazumaay mawada tu ku inaay a sakakawawan a hulic, zayhan i ayawway ningangayawan tu mahicahicaay a kawawa. Columbia tusa kuni u patahekalan a nilaculan u simal atu kuhi i ayaw caay ka kaph, kuhi u ni alaan kayadah atu aca caay ka kapah, simal paydemiad mawada' tu kuni patakal, maydih a lalit asa miazih mipatadas tu baluhay a ubah nu sumal. Columbia mahamin a mihcaan papulung tu cacay u kalinulakan a kawaw nu lisin, mahiniay u patinaku tu mahiniay u nu "tedemaway caay kunutuuday a lalangawanay u ni subelitan a caysan a nilaculan, tayhiw amipangangan ni sulitan tu Pa-lan-ci-ya-ciy-nian-hua"Ś∑īŤė≠ŚüļšļěŚėČŚĻīŤŹĮ". (u kamu nu Hulam: .) malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ¶or~…ĺumbia ¶or~…ĺumbia ¶or~…ĺumbia kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ (****:*…ôp*br~…ĺi ¶a d…ô ¶or~…ĺombia), paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ¶or~…ĺumbia , u nan-m…ô- ¶uw i satipan nu amisanaj a kanatar~…ĺ. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kawaw nu ńßitaj ¶or~…ĺumbia nu r~…ĺa-tiŇč-m…ô- ¶uw u satabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺ nu kawawa nu ńßitaj izaw ku i tiniaj u satabakiaj u sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a kawaw nu ńßitj ajza u mar~…ĺańßitaaj a ńßitaj izaw ku ***,*** ku tad…ômaw, i tuni i kitakit u sakasabaw ¶a ¶aj, u pir~…ĺawp…ôs tu kar~…ĺisiw nu ńßitaj ***.** i Ē~ °nu amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw, i r~…ĺa-m…ô kanatar~…ĺan ujza dada Ē~ ° i bazir~…ĺ . ¶or~…ĺumbia a ¶in- ¶i ńßa tinikat…ôn…ôs masaadidi Ē~ ° nu kanatar~…ĺ z…ôn-bu anizat…ôŇčan mawada tu atu sijkaj z…ôn-bu a kasir~…ĺut ¶aaj kan…ôt…ôk mańßini ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺit ajza satu k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja z…ôn-bu mi ¶uzuńß tu ijaŇč-r~…ĺaw- ¶iŇč pasumat sapańßapaj tu babar~…ĺaki a kar~…ĺisiw, atu masazumaaj mawada tu ku inaaj a sakakawawan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶, zajńßan i ajawwaj niŇčaŇčajawan tu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a kawawa. ¶or~…ĺumbia tusa kuni u patańß…ôkar~…ĺan a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan u simar~…ĺ atu kuńßi i ajaw ¶aaj ka kapńß, kuńßi u ni ar~…ĺaan kajadańß atu a ¶a ¶aaj ka kapańß, simar~…ĺ pajd…ômiad mawada Ē~ ° tu kuni patakar~…ĺ, majdińß a r~…ĺar~…ĺit asa miazińß mipatadas tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ubańß nu sumar~…ĺ. ¶or~…ĺumbia mańßamin a mińß ¶aan papur~…ĺuŇč tu ¶a ¶aj u kar~…ĺinur~…ĺakan a kawaw nu r~…ĺisin, mańßiniaj u patinaku tu mańßiniaj u nu "t…ôd…ômawaj ¶aaj kunutuudaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawanaj u ni sub…ôr~…ĺitan a ¶ajsan a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, tajńßiw amipaŇčaŇčan ni sur~…ĺitan tu pa-r~…ĺan- ¶i-ja- ¶ij-nian-ńßua"*******".
